aesthetic: a wizard's dreamhold made solid — serene and dreamlike; its open-air exteriors radiant and sunlit (mountain gardens, verdant marble terraces, bright skies), its chambers warm and softly lit, only its deepest sealed vaults and caverns dim and hushed, each lit as its own sources allow

scenes.cell: A tiny stone cell barely wider than outstretched arms, chopped raw and square from unfinished grey stone; only the floor is finished, a smooth fine white surface underfoot. A single narrow gap pierces the wall ahead. Cramped and enclosing.
scenes.narrow-hallway: A short, windowless stone hallway. Ahead, the foot of a flight of stairs rises out of sight into dimness; at the other end the hall narrows to a small gap of a doorway. Plain dim stone.
scenes.crowded-study: A scholar's study so crammed there is barely room to stand, seen from just inside the doorway looking across the room. Centre-ahead a massive, well-worn wooden desk bears a single immense book on its otherwise bare top; directly beyond it stands a tall glass-fronted cabinet with a small closed brass trunk beside it. The panelled walls are jammed floor to rafter with books, papers, dried plants, preserved animals, antique instruments and candles of every hue, and books stack on the floor and scatter across everything. Heavy dark roof-beams cross overhead. On the wall to the right a heavy wooden door strapped with iron, its knob secured by a thick iron lock, stands closed; the room's other openings are plain gaps half-lost in the clutter or behind the viewpoint, out of frame. A cluttered, enclosing chamber.
scenes.sitting-room: An inviting parlour seen from the doorway. Ahead, on the far wall, a hearth carries a desert-landscape painting above it — a stark rocky desert at dawn, dusty stones stained harsh scarlet and rust, the land serene and unthreatened. Two chairs and a cushioned settee stand before the hearth, facing it, seen from behind. The hearth holds no wood and no ash; instead a basket of coiled silver wire cradles a heap of glassy, glowing cherry-red spheres, with insubstantial flame flickering above them. The walls are painted with delicate flower patterns that merge into a soft flower-petal carpet. On the wall to the right a panelled white door with an ornate copper knob stands closed; the room's other doorways lie behind the viewpoint, out of frame. A small, inviting chamber.
scenes.curving-hall: A high, dim corridor of cracked and moldering plaster, curving gently out of sight at both ends. The only light comes from tiny candles flickering high above; the plaster arches to a crude vault overhead, and the floor is worn, unevenly-laid wooden boards. An open white door stands in one wall and a dim archway opens in another; the corridor curves away into shadow.
scenes.curving-hall-south-end: The dim, candlelit plaster corridor ends at a blank wall set with one large window, through which sunlight pours and brightens the hall. The window is a broad, flawless, inhumanly-smooth glass pane looking out from a sheer cliff over a sunlit mountainous world: no ground below the sill, stony slopes far below breaking into a verdant valley, sunlit threads of stream amid the green, and range beyond range of mountains. A dim archway and a plain white closed door open to either side; the bright window dominates.
scenes.dim-shed: A small, windowless garden shed of bare hard-packed dirt floor and rough unfinished plank walls, seen from just inside its archway looking into the room. Daylight spills in from the archway behind the viewpoint — the only light — fading into dimness ahead. On the left a narrow opening gives onto a steep stairway climbing up into darkness. Plain, dim and cramped.
scenes.landing: A cramped, dark stair-landing where a flight of stairs reverses and continues upward. The walls press close and dark. Claustrophobic.
scenes.mountain-path: The foot of a low rocky cliff under a vast, unclouded blue sky, the afternoon sun an exuberant glare. Mossy boulders hem in both sides; a tidy path winds away ahead between them, and behind, the path enters a crack in the cliff onto stairs descending into enclosed darkness.
scenes.mountain-garden: A tiny pleasance-garden nestled high on a mountainside: odd bits of statuary among sculpted grassy slopes and hillocks, small marble pillars marking the borders of the knotted paths, the lawn perfectly trimmed. The mountain towers ahead and fills the background; high on its face sits a small, distant, featureless white dome, and above stretches a wide blue mountain sky with an exuberant early-afternoon sun. A tidy path runs away ahead toward the mountain, threading between mossy boulders; a wider path crosses in front, dropping down a grassy slope to the left and rising up to the right.
scenes.cool-bower: A small promontory jutting from the mountain face, shrubs and raised flowerbeds around a path that slopes down on one side; on two open sides a sharp dropoff over a lush green valley far below. At the centre squats a single dense, dark bush, its branches knotting heavily then spreading into sprays of delicate blue-green needles with small clusters of translucent white berries hidden within. A chill fog spreads out from beneath the bush, rolling across the ground and spilling over the promontory's edges.
scenes.warm-bower: A sun-hot garden corner tucked into a natural alcove, stone bluffs rising on three sides; on the open side the ground drops away to a lush valley far below, and a path curves up around an outcropping. A single tall, wild bush dominates the space, taller than a person, its branches twisting in profusion then leaping chaotically upward, spraying narrow gold-veined glossy leaves; clusters of brilliant orange berries hang half-concealed amid the tangled coal-black branches. Grey wisps of woodsmoke — no flame, no ember-glow — curl from the black stems and ribbon upward into the air.
scenes.marble-balcony: A gently curved white-marble balcony looking out over a green vista: stony mountain slopes crumbling into bracken and pine and verdant forest, a lush valley floor, a bright thread of stream, a distant silver arc of lake, and taller mountains standing like patient shadows in the blue air. At the balcony's centre a white marble statue twice life-size towers, looking out over the valley — its form abstract and genderless, all smooth marble curves, weight forward, head turned and chin raised as if something rising from the valley had caught its attention. An absurdly small, flat gold mask is balanced on its brow, over where the eyes would be.
scenes.mosaic-room: A small room whose walls and ceiling are entirely covered in tiny blue tiles forming a perfect mosaic sky, rising up the walls and across the ceiling, with a few black and grey mosaic birds circling near one horizon. A single archway leads out. At the centre, a delicate cage of brass wire hangs from a curved stand, its little door closed; within the cage sits a single ripe, perfect apple.
scenes.atelier: A cramped, boxy artist's studio, its walls and floor splattered with paints of many colours but otherwise nearly empty — no stacks of canvas, no bottles of pigment. A rough wooden easel at one end holds a painting of a bright mountain landscape; a tripod at the other end props up a small telescope; a pigment-daubed palette board leans in a corner. One narrow exit.
scenes.metal-culvert: A dark, curving culvert of polished metal gone antique with tarnish. One end of the channel closes in a circular glass barrier; the other opens out into light. Curved metal walls all around, dim and enclosing.
scenes.mountain-pool: Impossible, unreal mountains — knife-like spires of rock — tear the sky in every direction. But in a sheltered nook, life flourishes: a small mossy pool, cool and shadowed, the shapes of tiny fish moving in it, gathered below a trickling rock-spring.
scenes.platform-in-the-void: A narrow wooden platform, hardly wider than a person is tall, suspended impossibly in a vast, incomprehensible space. The plank stretches away to either side. The space beyond is neither dark nor light — a featureless void the eye cannot focus upon.
scenes.red-desert: A stark desert spread flat in every direction, the harsh grit underfoot littered with dusty stones large and small. The sun is a low red glare on the horizon, turning the whole world to strokes of scarlet, rust, and shadow.
scenes.sea-of-white: A vast, choppy, heaving sea of milk-white waves rolling to every horizon, with no land in any direction — and, impossibly, the vantage stands balanced upon the white waves themselves.
scenes.curving-hall-at-pedestal: The dim plaster corridor curves out of sight to either side, lit only by tiny candles; the plaster arches to a crude vault and the floor is worn wooden boards. A short pedestal of black marble stands against the inner wall in the foreground; dim archways open off the curve.
scenes.natural-passage: A narrow natural passage winding between irregular stone walls, clearly never carved by human hands — creamy limestone lapping and dripping in ancient, water-worn folds. To one side behind, an archway glows with the only light; ahead, the passage vanishes into cave-blackness.
scenes.darkness: Near-total blackness, infinitely far away and an inch from groping hands at once. Only the faintest groping suggestion of space in the dark; almost nothing visible.
scenes.subterrane-world: A vast domed cavern perceived without light — every edge sensed in pure darkness rather than seen. Behemoth columns of stone, shaped to perfect smoothness, stand in a perfect circular array; a vast carved form looms high in the cross-vaulted roof overhead; the rough-hewn floor stretches below. Shapes of black stone emerging from total blackness, unlit.
scenes.sitting-room-on-the-settee: The inviting parlour seen from the cushioned settee, which is beneath the viewpoint and out of frame: ahead, on the far wall, is the hearth — holding no wood fire but a silver-wire basket of glowing cherry-red glass spheres with insubstantial flame flickering above them. A desert-landscape painting (a stark rocky desert at dawn, its stones stained harsh scarlet and rust) hangs above the hearth. Two chairs stand ahead facing the hearth, seen from behind. The walls are painted with delicate patterns of flowers that merge into a soft flower-petal carpet underfoot. On the right a white-painted door with an ornate copper knob stands closed; the room's two other plain doorways lie behind the viewpoint, out of frame.
scenes.dark-dome-east: The edge of a vast round space arching into one immense dome overhead; a diffuse, colourless light barely bright enough to see by washes only the lower reaches. The dome stretches away across to the far side. An open archway stands in the near wall, with stairs descending beyond it. Far across at the rim, a ladder is a small distant mark, and a low metal pyramid sits as a small dark shape at the centre of the dim floor.
scenes.dark-dome-north: The edge of a vast round domed space, dim under a diffuse colourless light. A bare iron ladder pierces the floor here and rises through an opening in the dome's skirt, running both up and down. The dome arches away across to the far side, where a doorway is a small distant mark at the rim; a low metal pyramid is a small dark shape at the centre of the floor.
scenes.dark-dome-west: The edge of a vast round domed space, dim under a diffuse colourless light. The immense dome stretches away across to the far side; a ladder shows as a small distant mark at one point on the rim, and a doorway is barely visible all the way across at another. A low metal pyramid sits as a small dark shape at the centre of the dim floor.
scenes.dark-dome-south: The edge of a vast round domed space, dim under a diffuse colourless light. The immense dome stretches away across to the far side; a doorway shows as a small distant mark at one point on the rim, and a ladder is barely visible all the way across at another. A low metal pyramid sits as a small dark shape at the centre of the dim floor.
scenes.dark-dome-center: The dead centre of a vast round space, an immense dome arching high overhead, lost in near-total darkness; the only light is a faint colourless glow seeping along the distant lower rim, leaving the centre and the whole curve above in deep shadow. At the centre of the floor stands a low six-sided metal pyramid, about a yard across and knee-high, its surface a strange faint sheen as if engraved with countless parallel lines, with hinges along one base edge and a handle opposite, sitting closed. A doorway and a ladder show as small distant marks at opposite points of the dome's far rim.
scenes.starry-dome-center: The centre of a vast round dome, now dark, its great curving inner surface scattered all over with constellations of stars like a planetarium sky. The low, closed six-sided metal pyramid stands at the centre of the dimly-sensed floor; the dome soars overhead spangled with star-groups.
scenes.starry-dome-east: The edge of a vast round dome, now dark, its great curving inner surface scattered with constellations of stars. The dim floor stretches away below; an open doorway stands in the near rim, and a ladder shows as a small distant mark across the dome. Star-groups spangle the dark dome overhead.
scenes.starry-dome-south: The edge of a vast round dome, now dark, its great curving inner surface scattered all over with constellations of stars. The dim floor stretches away below; star-groups spangle the dark dome overhead.
scenes.starry-dome-west: The edge of a vast round dome, now dark, its great curving inner surface scattered with constellations of stars. The dim floor stretches away below; star-groups spangle the dark dome overhead.
scenes.starry-dome-north: The edge of a vast round dome, now dark, its great curving inner surface scattered all over with constellations of stars. A bare iron ladder pierces the floor here, running up through the dome and down through the floor. The dim floor stretches away below; star-groups spangle the dark dome overhead.
scenes.lit-dome-center: The centre of a vast round dome, now flooded with brilliant, blinding white light pouring from every surface. At the centre of the floor stands a low six-sided metal pyramid — about a yard across, knee-high, its surface faintly line-engraved, hinged along one base edge with a handle opposite, pulled open to reveal a small silver-wire spiral basket within, now blazing with white light. The whole dome arches overhead, fully and dazzlingly lit.
scenes.translucent-dome: A small round dome, far smaller than the vast dark space below it, its curving translucent surface glowing soft and bright with daylight filtering in from outside, though nothing outside can be seen — a glowing white shell. The floor is a harsh metal grating; an iron ladder rises through a hole in the grating in the foreground, up to a matching opening in the dome overhead. A low platform fills the centre of the floor, piled high with split lengths of wood in an immense semicircular heap. Rising along the far curve of the dome stands a tall triangle of beaten copper — a thin hammered sheet, as wide at its base as outstretched arms, tapering and curving inward to hug the dome's inner surface, its peak halfway up the dome, like a billowing sail; its base rests in a narrow circular track that runs all the way around the dome a finger's width from its lower edge.
scenes.catwalk-south: A narrow, railless iron catwalk circling the outside of a small pale dome, high on the sunlit shoulder of a mountain peak. A few iron steps climb the dome's flank to a round opening, a ladder descending inside. Far below lies a small terrace of knotted, spiralled garden paths, and far below that a bright green valley spreading into the distance. The sky is unclouded blue, the afternoon sun an exuberant glare.
scenes.catwalk-west: The edge of a narrow railless catwalk circling a small pale dome, high on a sunlit mountain peak. The mountain peak towers close on the dome side; on the open side the stone slopes fall away to a wide valley shining green in the afternoon light. Unclouded blue sky, bright sun.
scenes.catwalk-north: The narrow railless catwalk girdling a small pale dome. The mountain rises massively close on one side, but separated from the dome's promontory by a deep, jagged ravine several yards across. A tiny ledge is just visible angling across the mountain's cliff-face beyond the gap. Unclouded blue sky, bright afternoon sun.
scenes.catwalk-east: The edge of a narrow railless catwalk circling a small pale dome, high on a sunlit mountain peak. The mountain towers on the dome side; the stone slopes fall to a verdant valley on the open side. Unclouded blue sky, exuberant sun.
scenes.catwalk-south-night: A narrow railless iron catwalk circling the outside of a small pale dome, high on a mountain shoulder, under a black sky thick with stars and a risen moon ringed by a halo. The dome glows from a fire lit within, and a few iron steps climb its flank to a round opening. Far below lie a terrace of spiralled garden paths and a darkened valley beyond.
scenes.catwalk-east-night: The edge of a railless catwalk circling a small pale dome, under a black star-thick sky with a haloed moon. The dome glows from the fire within; the mountain towers on the dome side, the dark slopes falling to the valley on the open side.
scenes.catwalk-west-night: The edge of a railless catwalk circling a small pale dome at night. Inside the dome, a tall copper sail shows as a dark silhouette against the firelight, throwing a long black shadow out across the catwalk and into the empty air beyond. A black star-thick sky and haloed moon above; the dark valley far below.
scenes.catwalk-north-night: The railless catwalk girdling a small pale dome at night, the mountain rising close beyond a deep ravine. Inside the dome the tall copper sail is a dark silhouette against the firelight, and its shadow falls as an immensely elongated black triangle stretching out across the catwalk and hanging impossibly in the air toward the mountain face. Black star-thick sky, haloed moon.
scenes.ledge-night: The far end of a long black tongue of shadow that bridges a deep ravine in empty air, where it meets a towering mountain cliff. Behind, across the ravine, a fire-lit dome glows; directly ahead a narrow ledge angles across the mountain's rock face. The shadow underfoot lies heavier and darker than any shadow should, supporting the vantage over the void. Black star-thick sky, haloed moon.
scenes.south-alcove: A small, curved alcove opening off the great chamber. A plain iron ladder rises up a shaft overhead. Ahead, through the opening, the same vast orrery turns in the chamber beyond, seen three-quarter from the side: the great brass disk on its tilted axis; a large globe of blue glass, fixed at its centre, patterned brown and white like a map of islands; and two smaller wheels on its face — a silver wheel carrying a violet globe and a smaller tan globe ringed with frosted glass, and a copper wheel carrying a banded red globe and a small green globe — with gears and shafts turning below. A plain stone floor underfoot.
scenes.orrery: A wide, tall, dimly lit six-sided chamber, dominated by a vast machine that nearly fills the room — an engine of gears, shafts and clattering motion. Its heart is a great stately disk of brass turning slowly on a tilted axis: a clean perfect circle, its lower edge a few inches above the floor in the foreground, its opposite edge rising near the high roof in the background, its face engraved with intricate arcs and lines, caught mid-rotation. A large globe of blue glass, fixed at the disk’s centre, bears a delicate brown-and-white pattern like a map of islands in an impossible curved sea; the disk revolves around it. Two smaller wheels ride proud on the disk’s face, each turning and carrying its own glass globes: a silver wheel engraved with spiralling moiré, a globe of violet glass at its centre and a smaller tan globe (circled with heavy rings of frosted glass) on its rim; and, on the opposite side, a copper wheel of precise radial lines, a banded globe of red glass at its centre and a small green globe on its rim. The gear machinery driving the disk is tucked behind it, glimpsed in the gap below and at the edges. Small curved alcoves open to either side, one on the left and one on the right; a thin grey ribbon of soft material hangs from the vault over the disk’s upper edge; the vault above the machine is lost in shadow. A plain stone floor underfoot.
scenes.north-alcove: A small, curved alcove opening off the great chamber. An archway reveals a flight of stairs ascending out of sight. Ahead, through the opening, the same vast orrery turns in the chamber beyond, seen three-quarter from the other side: the great brass disk on its tilted axis; a large globe of blue glass, fixed at its centre, patterned brown and white like a map of islands; and two smaller wheels on its face — a silver wheel carrying a violet globe and a smaller tan globe, and a copper wheel carrying a banded red globe and a small green globe — with gears and shafts turning below. A plain stone floor underfoot.
scenes.curving-hall-west-end: The dim, candlelit plaster corridor ends at a blank wall set with a single window onto a strange underground prospect. The window is a broad, flawless glass pane looking out over a dark cavern deep underground: mammoth columns and cascades of flowstone dimly picked out by the candlelight behind, the farther reaches lost in darkness, and directly before it a shining waterfall — a stream pouring from a ledge and plummeting into a pit below the sill, its water sparkling with natural phosphorescence. A dim archway and a plain white door open to either side; the window dominates.
scenes.arboretum: A stark room, walls painted plain white and utterly undecorated, with a single archway leading out. In the centre stands an earthenware tub from which sprouts a tangle of vines and broad fan-like leaves crowned by one enormous golden flower — luxuriant growth clashing with the bare emptiness around it.
scenes.dank-jungle-in-the-earthenware-tub: Standing waist-deep in an empty earthenware tub in the midst of a trackless jungle. Heavy, entangled trunks and vines loom in every direction as far as can be seen — and that is not far. The sky is wholly obscured by layers of vegetation; only a murky green light filters down. Golden flowers dot the trees like bursts of sun.
scenes.harp-chamber: A circular chamber ringed by broad golden pillars, the deep-set walls between them painted in variegated shades of blue and sea-green and lit from some hidden source. At the centre stand the remains of a tall harp in proud ruin — its pillar and frame blackened and cracked as if destroyed in an inferno, its soundbox split apart, its few remaining strings curled to knots of ash, though the room shows no other sign of fire. One archway leads out; on the far side a closed door, fitted with only a simple latch, leaks intolerable, blinding light around all its edges.
scenes.vaulting-cavern: A high, arched natural cavern deep in the earth, lit by torchlight. The floor is studded with stalagmites and stone columns; stalactites hang glittering with droplets above, and a vein of dark ore streaks across the pale limestone vault. A narrow passage and a broader one open off the cave, and a low crawl runs off another way; at one edge the floor slopes abruptly into a twisting pit, with wisps of steam rising from its depths.
scenes.shore-of-river: The near shore of a silent black river — a sheet of mirror-dark water slipping endlessly past. A broad passage leads back behind; across the water, the far shore is a narrow ledge of scree and rubble. The thin roar of a distant waterfall sounds far off.
scenes.far-shore-of-river: The far side of an underground river, a narrow shelf of loose rubble sloping down to the water's frozen edge, where ice still spans the river, slowly wearing away in the silent current. At the top of the slope a narrow crawl leads off away from the river.
scenes.river-crawl: A narrow, twisting crawlway, low and cramped; a faint rushing of water sounds somewhere above. The crawl slopes upward one way and angles even more sharply downward the other.
scenes.ledge-in-pit: A ledge against the wall of a twisty, irregular pit. Across the pit and slightly above, a narrow opening shows in the far wall, out of reach. A rough climbable path leads up; below, the pit drops away nearly vertical, the damp stone slick with condensation. A warm breath of misting air rises steadily up the shaft.
scenes.deep-in-pit: A roughly vertical shaft, the vantage clinging to holds in the wall; below, the pit narrows further, its smooth walls glistening with moisture, while the climb above looks marginally safer. A warm breath of misting air rises steadily up the shaft. Cramped and precarious.
scenes.depths-of-pit: Wedged knees-to-back in a narrow vertical shaft, one hand clutching a torch, the other gripping an angle of rock. Below, the shaft widens out into an impossible drop, ending far down in a bubbling underground pool jagged with rocks and shattered ice.
scenes.confusing-passage: A stone passage where great columns and masses of rock rise from floor to ceiling, the tunnel dividing and rejoining around them in a confusing tangle of minor branches. The roof is a twisted vault of stone hung with stalactites.
scenes.dead-end: A round, water-worn rock alcove where the passage comes to an abrupt end. The far wall is of dressed granite — a deliberate intrusion in these natural caverns — set with a heavy iron door: a massive slab with a high sill and an iron bar for a handle, no keyhole, tightly shut.
scenes.cistern-west: The edge of an immense and empty elliptical chamber, the heavy iron door just swung shut behind the viewpoint and out of frame, looking out across the chamber. The walls are granite blocks, tightly fitted and dressed, bare of window or ornament — it feels like a vast cistern, no place for human habitation. The floor is a flat, perfect plane of black stone — or metal, or glass, impossible to tell — giving no reflection; far above, the roof is an equally flat, featureless plane of luminescent white, radiating a perfect shadowless light. Both planes spread away into the distance, defining the vast chamber between them. Halfway up, a glass catwalk runs all the way around, girdling the room; a black column rises along the far wall ahead, from the black floor up to the catwalk.
scenes.cistern-east: The side of an immense elliptical chamber, beside a low glass platform about three strides across that juts from the granite wall an inch above the dead-black floor. A black column rises along the wall just past the platform, from the floor up to a glass catwalk that runs high around the chamber's perimeter. A heavy iron lever rises from the platform by the wall. Far overhead, a featureless white ellipse of ceiling radiates a shadowless light.
scenes.cistern-east-on-the-glass-platform: Standing on a low glass platform jutting from the granite wall of an immense elliptical chamber. Handholds cut into the wall beside it form a ladder running both up and down; a heavy iron lever rises from the platform by the wall; a black column rises alongside. The dead-black floor lies just below, and far overhead a featureless white ellipse of ceiling radiates a shadowless light.
scenes.cistern-bottom: The lowest point of an immense elliptical chamber, where the down-sloping black floor meets a granite wall. Directly overhead hangs a low glass platform; far above that a glass catwalk circles the chamber; and higher still the featureless white ellipse of ceiling spreads its radiance. A black column rises along the wall to the catwalk. At the floor's lowest angle by the wall lies a small black disk, the column merging into its rim, and a heavy iron wheel is set into the wall.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-east: Standing in a shallow, curved glass trough — the catwalk — that follows the granite wall of an immense elliptical chamber. Just past the trough's end a ladder of cut handholds runs down the wall, and between them a heavy brass pipe protrudes, ending in a graceful curved spout that bends toward the ladder. Through the clear glass the dead-black floor lies far below; overhead a featureless white ceiling radiates a shadowless light.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-northeast: Standing in the shallow, curved glass trough that girdles an immense elliptical chamber. A large, curved slab of glass leans nearly upright here, wedged against the sides of the trough. Through the clear glass the dead-black floor lies far below; the featureless white ceiling glows overhead.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-north: Standing in the shallow glass trough that girdles an immense elliptical chamber. The glass is cracked here — a web of fine fractures spiderwebs several feet of the surface, converging on a small, thumb-sized hole broken right through. The dead-black floor lies far below through the clear glass; the featureless white ceiling glows overhead.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-northwest: Standing in the shallow glass trough that girdles an immense elliptical chamber. The glass is rather cracked here — a web of fractures spreads nearly across the trough, converging on a large, fist-sized hole broken right through. The dead-black floor lies far below through the clear glass; the featureless white ceiling glows overhead.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-west: Standing in the shallow glass trough that girdles an immense elliptical chamber. The glass is heavily cracked here — fractures spiderweb several feet of the surface, converging on a medium, egg-sized hole broken right through. The dead-black floor lies far below through the clear glass; the featureless white ceiling glows overhead.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-southwest: Standing in the glass trough that girdles an immense elliptical chamber; parallel waves of cracks mar the glass, growing thicker and more shattered toward one end where the trough seems ready to fall into splinters. The dead-black floor lies far below through the glass; the featureless white ceiling glows overhead.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-south: Standing on a flat black pathway — the trough here is filled to the brim with a dead-black substance, a yard wide, running around the chamber wall. A black column descends from the catwalk against the far wall. Overhead the featureless white ceiling radiates a shadowless light.
scenes.cistern-catwalk-southeast: Where the black-filled catwalk bends sharply outward and ends at the granite wall. A round brass grate, pierced with finger-sized holes, is set into the wall at the trough's end, its surface coated with a pale, gauzy film; the black substance runs up to the grate but cannot pass, so it rears up and spills over the trough's edges to join a black column descending underfoot. Overhead the featureless white ceiling glows.
scenes.grey-chamber: An elliptical space with featureless walls and indistinct, indistinguishable grey planes above and below — an unrecognizable, echoless world. A small gap on one side opens back to familiar dark stone. Hanging in the air between floor and roof is a gleaming triangular shield, a bright buckler whose sharp bright edges are the only crisp lines anywhere in this indistinct grey void.
scenes.curtained-room: A small room swathed wall-to-wall in heavy brocade curtains, seen from just inside a curtained opening looking across the chamber. Ahead at the centre of the room a massive, high-backed chair of pale wood — nearly a throne, its joinery rough but finished smooth — faces a tall oval mirror set in a standing frame of iron bars directly before it, so the chair is seen from behind and slightly to one side; from this vantage the mirror holds only a faint, plain reflection of the room, nothing more. On the wall to the right a dull grey lead-slab door, a small keyhole beneath a heavy opening-bar, stands shut. The room's other curtained openings lie behind the viewpoint, out of frame. A small, enclosing chamber.
scenes.curtained-room-on-the-chair: A small room swathed wall-to-wall in heavy brocade curtains, seen from within — the viewpoint is the seat of the high-backed pale-wood chair itself, looking straight into a tall oval mirror set in a standing frame of iron bars directly ahead; the chair is beneath the viewpoint and out of frame. In the mirror the brocade curtains and the pale-wood chair reflect perfectly, and a shape of a person sits in the reflected chair — but its own form is unclear, as if the mirror were touched with some distorting oil; the blurring is strongest around the upper body and head. The head appears as a blurred faceless blank. Bright fragments of 1 of each in red, green, blue, black, brown, gold and white flit and orbit lazily above the chair.
scenes.iron-corridor: A windowless square tube of dark hammered iron stretching away ahead. A hanging sconce above trembles with yellow light. Ahead, the air itself is mirrored, and the lamp repeats in it again and again into a seeming endless distance.
scenes.iron-passage: A short connecting passage walled in dark hammered iron. A heavy wooden door strapped with iron stands at one end; the other opens into a large chamber. A single sconce hangs above, lighting the iron walls.
scenes.laboratory: A chamber built of massive squared stones, looking across it with the entry doorway behind and out of frame; the ceiling crawls with tiny worms of colourless light, the room's only illumination. Shelves line the wall on the left; the wall on the right bears an elaborate, finely-detailed mural — a stylized angular figure in a black cloak, a silver snakeskin belt beneath, a heavy gauntlet holding an outstretched black dagger, a small decorative shield on one shoulder and a dark bracer on the other arm, striding against a red sky toward a circled-orb sign. Between the two walls stands a worktable of a single heavy granite slab, several inches thick, resting on four irregular granite outcrops that rise through the floor to equal height; at its centre sits a complex apparatus of mirrors and lenses. A small drain opens in the slate flagstones beneath the table.
scenes.shadow-path-west-of-dome-night: A long, flat tongue of solid black shadow hanging impossibly in empty air, bridging a deep ravine. Behind stands a fire-lit dome; the shadow-path runs ahead toward a towering mountain that rises as a black shape against star-filled sky on one side, while on the other the dim green garden and valley fall away far below. A black night sky thick with stars, a haloed moon above.
scenes.shadow-path-far-west-of-dome-night: The black shadow-path narrows as it runs out into empty air, converging to a vanishing point a few yards ahead. Behind, the dome is a small fire-lit red bauble across the ravine; the mountain towers as a black shape against the stars on one side, the dim green valley falling away on the other. Star-thick night sky, a haloed moon.
scenes.catwalk-west-unearthly: The edge of a railless catwalk circling a small pale dome. Inside, a tall copper sail shows as a dark silhouette, throwing a long black shadow out across the catwalk into empty air. Overhead the sky is a racing nightmare of scarlet, carmine, rust and magenta streaming across the heavens; there is no sun, and the world is lit only in harsh red.
scenes.cell-possibly: A tiny cell barely wider than outstretched arms, chopped raw from unfinished grey stone, the low ceiling crowding down. The smooth floor is one intricate web of swirling geometric marks running wall to wall. Eight narrow gaps pierce the walls, one in each direction.
scenes.white-hallway-possibly: A high, dim corridor of cracked, moldering white plaster, lit by tiny flickering candles above and arching to a crude vault. The floor is covered in swirling geometric marks. The hall curves gently away in every direction at once, opening eight ways.
scenes.gold-harp-chamber-possibly: A circular chamber ringed by broad golden pillars, the deep-set walls between them painted in variegated yellow and amber and lit from some hidden source. The floor is awash with swirling geometric marks, and archways open in every direction. At the centre stands an unstrung harp of gold.
scenes.red-curtained-room-possibly: A small room whose walls are entirely swathed in heavy red brocade curtains, its floor covered with swirling geometric diagrams, openings leading out in every direction. At the centre stands an empty standing mirror-frame, its glass gone.
scenes.brown-shed-possibly: A small shed with walls of unfinished brown planks, its floor a plane of swirling geometric diagrams. Narrow openings in every direction lead to eight steep stairways climbing away into darkness.
scenes.green-bower-possibly: A tiny mountainside garden bower, shrubs and raised flowerbeds set atop a plane of swirling geometric markings. A lush green valley shows in the distance, and eight paths run off in every direction.
scenes.blue-mosaic-room-possibly: A room whose walls and ceiling are entirely tiny blue tiles forming a perfect blue mosaic sky, its floor a plane of swirling geometric diagrams. Archways open in every direction. At the centre, a tiny brass bird perches on a curved stand.
scenes.black-night-perhaps: Surrounded by deep open night sky, stars wheeling slowly in every direction. Far below stretches a faint, infinite plane of dark geometric markings on blackness, too sparse to bisect the night.
scenes.catwalk-south-unearthly: A narrow railless catwalk circling a small pale dome high on a mountain shoulder, the dome glowing from the fire within, a few iron steps climbing to a round opening. Far below lie a terrace of spiralled garden paths and the valley beyond. Overhead the sky is a racing nightmare of scarlet, carmine and rust streaming across the heavens — no sun, the world lit only in harsh red.
scenes.shadow-path-west-of-dome-unearthly: A long, flat tongue of solid black shadow hanging impossibly in empty air, bridging a deep ravine; a fire-lit dome behind, the path running ahead toward a towering black mountain on one side, the dim green valley falling away on the other. Overhead the sky is a racing flood of scarlet, carmine and rust — no sun, the world lit only in harsh red.
scenes.shadow-path-far-west-of-dome-unearthly: The black shadow-path narrows to a vanishing point a few yards ahead out over empty air; behind, the dome is a small red bauble across the ravine, the mountain a black shape on one side, the dim valley on the other. The sky is a racing torrent of scarlet and rust — no sun, harsh red light.
scenes.catwalk-east-unearthly: The edge of a railless catwalk circling a small pale dome on a mountain peak; the mountain towers on the dome side, the slopes falling to the valley on the open side. The sky is a racing torrent of scarlet, carmine and rust — no sun, the world lit only in harsh red.
scenes.catwalk-north-unearthly: The railless catwalk girdling a small pale dome, the mountain rising close beyond a deep, jagged ravine; a tiny ledge is just visible on the cliff-face beyond the gap. The sky is a racing nightmare of scarlet and rust streaming overhead — no sun, the world lit only in harsh red.
